bits.premise: A Jackass-style stage persona can become a crude ass pun.
A bad comedy set can be turned into a punishment stunt with a shock collar.
Praise for women's sports can be undercut by sexist stereotypes.
A forehead feature can look like a penis.
Giving someone a shock-collar remote can look like long-awaited control over men.
Playing copyrighted music as a stunt can threaten an episode's monetization.
A self-imposed shock-collar stunt becomes terrifying when the setting gets turned too high.
A gross-out taste test can escalate by presenting animal semen as a real drink.
Threatening to remove a penis also threatens its future sexual usefulness.
Trivia penalties can be made absurd by combining basic questions with disgusting drinks.
